a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Chile: COVID-19 weekly death rate by vaccination status, All ages
Death rates are calculated as the number of deaths in each group, divided by the total number of people in this group.
Data source: Departamento de Epidemiología, Ministerio de Salud de Chile. (2023)
Note: The mortality rate for the 'All ages' group is age-standardized to account for the different vaccination rates of older and younger people.
